heading: Purpose of Institute
label: 285j Purpose of Institute
text: The general purpose of the National Institute of Neurological Disorders and Stroke (hereafter in this subpart referred to as the “Institute”) is the conduct and support of research, training, health information dissemination, and other programs with respect to neurological disease and disorder and stroke.
notes: Amendments1989— substituted “disease and” for “disease and and”.Pub. L. 101–931988— and made identical amendments, substituting “Neurological Disorders” for “Neurological and Communicative Disorders” and “and disorder and stroke” for “disorder, stroke, and disorders of human communication”. amended this section to read as if the amendments by had not been enacted.Pub. L. 100–553Pub. L. 100–607Pub. L. 100–690Pub. L. 100–607
